title: Re-enable “bud with ADD with git repository source escape directory”
body:
It is failing in CI: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6875#issuecomment-4556149665 and disabled.

it would probably need something like https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/20c6bd5bdd9e2d2c77a8a0e6f75cc0bffe458f51/test/buildah-bud/run-buildah-bud-tests#L165-L178 .

Cc: @Honny1
